members.name: GetAxisFlags
members.summary: Returns the axis flags of the setting at [param index].

members.name: GetCopyFlags
members.summary: Returns the copy flags of the setting at [param index].

members.name: GetInvertFlags
members.summary: Returns the invert flags of the setting at [param index].

members.name: IsAdditive
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the additive option is enabled in the setting at [param index].

members.name: IsAxisXEnabled
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the enable flags has the flag for the X-axis in the setting at [param index]. See also [method set_axis_flags].

members.name: IsAxisXInverted
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the invert flags has the flag for the X-axis in the setting at [param index]. See also [method set_invert_flags].

members.name: IsAxisYEnabled
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the enable flags has the flag for the Y-axis in the setting at [param index]. See also [method set_axis_flags].

members.name: IsAxisYInverted
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the invert flags has the flag for the Y-axis in the setting at [param index]. See also [method set_invert_flags].

members.name: IsAxisZEnabled
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the enable flags has the flag for the Z-axis in the setting at [param index]. See also [method set_axis_flags].

members.name: IsAxisZInverted
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the invert flags has the flag for the Z-axis in the setting at [param index]. See also [method set_invert_flags].

members.name: IsPositionCopying
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the copy flags has the flag for the position in the setting at [param index]. See also [method set_copy_flags].

members.name: IsRelative
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the relative option is enabled in the setting at [param index].

members.name: IsRotationCopying
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the copy flags has the flag for the rotation in the setting at [param index]. See also [method set_copy_flags].

members.name: IsScaleCopying
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the copy flags has the flag for the scale in the setting at [param index]. See also [method set_copy_flags].

members.name: SetAdditive
members.signature: public void SetAdditive(int index, bool enabled)
members.summary: Sets additive option in the setting at [param index] to [param enabled]. This mainly affects the process of applying transform to the [method BoneConstraint3D.set_apply_bone]. If sets [param enabled] to [code]true[/code], the processed transform is added to the pose of the current apply bone. If sets [param enabled] to [code]false[/code], the pose of the current apply bone is replaced with the processed transform. However, if set [method set_relative] to [code]true[/code], the transform is relative to rest.

members.name: SetAxisFlags
members.signature: public void SetAxisFlags(int index, int axisFlags)
members.summary: Sets the flags to copy axes. If the flag is valid, the axis is copied.

members.name: SetAxisXEnabled
members.signature: public void SetAxisXEnabled(int index, bool enabled)
members.summary: If sets [param enabled] to [code]true[/code], the X-axis will be copied.

members.name: SetAxisXInverted
members.signature: public void SetAxisXInverted(int index, bool enabled)
members.summary: If sets [param enabled] to [code]true[/code], the X-axis will be inverted.

members.name: SetAxisYEnabled
members.signature: public void SetAxisYEnabled(int index, bool enabled)
members.summary: If sets [param enabled] to [code]true[/code], the Y-axis will be copied.

members.name: SetAxisYInverted
members.signature: public void SetAxisYInverted(int index, bool enabled)
members.summary: If sets [param enabled] to [code]true[/code], the Y-axis will be inverted.

members.name: SetAxisZEnabled
members.signature: public void SetAxisZEnabled(int index, bool enabled)
members.summary: If sets [param enabled] to [code]true[/code], the Z-axis will be copied.

members.name: SetAxisZInverted
members.signature: public void SetAxisZInverted(int index, bool enabled)
members.summary: If sets [param enabled] to [code]true[/code], the Z-axis will be inverted.

members.name: SetCopyFlags
members.signature: public void SetCopyFlags(int index, int copyFlags)
members.summary: Sets the flags to process the transform operations. If the flag is valid, the transform operation is processed. [b]Note:[/b] If the rotation is valid for only one axis, it respects the roll of the valid axis. If the rotation is valid for two axes, it discards the roll of the invalid axis.

members.name: SetCopyPosition
members.signature: public void SetCopyPosition(int index, bool enabled)
members.summary: If sets [param enabled] to [code]true[/code], the position will be copied.

members.name: SetCopyRotation
members.signature: public void SetCopyRotation(int index, bool enabled)
members.summary: If sets [param enabled] to [code]true[/code], the rotation will be copied.

members.name: SetCopyScale
members.signature: public void SetCopyScale(int index, bool enabled)
members.summary: If sets [param enabled] to [code]true[/code], the scale will be copied.

members.name: SetInvertFlags
members.signature: public void SetInvertFlags(int index, int axisFlags)
members.summary: Sets the flags to inverte axes. If the flag is valid, the axis is copied. [b]Note:[/b] An inverted scale means an inverse number, not a negative scale. For example, inverting [code]2.0[/code] means [code]0.5[/code]. [b]Note:[/b] An inverted rotation flips the elements of the quaternion. For example, a two-axis inversion will flip the roll of each axis, and a three-axis inversion will flip the final orientation. However, be aware that flipping only one axis may cause unintended rotation by the unflipped axes, due to the characteristics of the quaternion.

members.name: SetRelative
members.signature: public void SetRelative(int index, bool enabled)
members.summary: Sets relative option in the setting at [param index] to [param enabled]. If sets [param enabled] to [code]true[/code], the extracted and applying transform is relative to the rest. If sets [param enabled] to [code]false[/code], the extracted transform is absolute.

members.name: SettingCount
members.summary: The number of settings in the modifier.
